name: DUNGEON RAZE
short_description: Here’s a fast-paced dungeon destruction shooter you can clear in as little as 30 minutes! Break walls for shortcuts, detours, or direct paths. Double ammo, halve reload time, and power up to smash through even the toughest walls!
detailed_description:
Clear the game in under 30 minutes if you're quick—it's a fast-paced dungeon “Raze” shooter! Break down walls for shortcuts, detours, or just blast your way through! Forge your own path and dive deeper into the dungeon…

Destroy everything within the time limit

The dungeon’s defense systems are active. Before you’re detected, break the walls to collect power-up items, rescue imprisoned adventurers, and aim for the deepest part of the dungeon!

Overrun everything with overwhelming power

Don't give up if you die. Even the toughest walls will be blown to smithereens by the incredible power of "Hyper-Inflation" upgrades!

Conquer numerous dungeons

Take on Speed Attacks, high-difficulty dungeons, and even an Endless Dungeon that goes on forever.
